name: Beimdiek Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Beimdiek Recreation Center in Joplin, MO! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Bulldog Beach
description: Come play pickleball at Bulldog Beach in Carl Junction, MO! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Carl Junction Community Center
description: Carl Junction Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Carl Junction, MO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Ewert Park
description: Ewert Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Joplin, MO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Fair Acres Family YMCA
description: Fair Acres Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carthage, MO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Griggs Parks
description: Come play pickleball at Griggs Parks in Carthage, MO! There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Joplin Family YMCA
description: Joplin Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Joplin, MO. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Landreth Park Pickleball Courts
description: Landreth Park Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Joplin, MO. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Millennium Tennis & Fitness Club
description: Millennium Tennis & Fitness Club is a place to play pickleball in Joplin, MO. There are 12 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Tee Time
description: Come play pickleball at Tee Time in Webb City, MO! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — One time $5 Lifetime Membership, $5-$20 an hour depending on the day and time.
